name: Read
output:
1	# Reconix Customer App — Design System (foundation)
2	
3	This file is the shared design foundation referenced by every per-surface spec in this folder. Read this first. Every subsequent surface spec assumes these tokens, voice, and component vocab.
4	
5	**Product:** Reconix — privacy-compliance scanning SaaS. URL `app.reconix.ai`. Astro SSR on Cloudflare Workers.
6	
7	**Primary ICP:** DPO / Privacy Engineer. **Secondary:** MarOps lead, TPRM / Privacy Law researcher in observer mode.
8	
9	**Tone:** factual, evidence-led, editorial. Reconix shows its work. Reconix is observe-only — it never claims to remediate, predict settlements, or invent data.
10	
11	---
12	
13	## 1. Color tokens
14	
15	Light theme is the default. Dark theme is supported via `[data-theme="dark"]` on `<html>`. Each token below carries a light/dark pair where applicable.
16	
17	### Neutrals — cool slate scale
18	
19	| Token | Light | Dark | Use |
20	|---|---|---|---|
21	| `--bg-0` | `#fafbfc` | `#0b1019` | Page background (NOT pure white — cool tinted) |
22	| `--bg-1` | `#f1f5f9` | `#0f172a` | Secondary surface (sidebars, masthead bands) |
23	| `--bg-tint` | `#faf9ff` | `#19132e` | Pro card / accent surface (purple-tinted) |
24	| `--tx-1` | `#0f172a` | `#f8fafc` | Primary text |
25	| `--tx-2` | `#475569` | `#94a3b8` | Secondary text (body 17px) |
26	| `--tx-3` | `#94a3b8` | `#64748b` | Tertiary text (mono fingerprints) |
27	| `--border` | `#e2e8f0` | `#1e293b` | Hairline borders, dividers |
28	| `--border-h` | `#cbd5e1` | `#334155` | Hover state for borders |
29	
30	NEVER use pure `#000` or `#fff`. Every neutral is tinted cool toward `oklch(slate)`.
31	
32	### Brand purple — accent
33	
34	| Token | Value | Use |
35	|---|---|---|
36	| `--purple` | `#7c3aed` | Brand purple. CTA button fills, selected-row indicators, Pro card border, AI-flow accent. |
37	| `--purple-bg` | `#f3e8ff` | Light purple tint for status pills, inline marks. |
38	
39	**Purple budget: <10% of pixel area, surface-by-surface enforcement.** Purple is reserved for: (a) the single primary CTA per visible band, (b) the "Recommended for production" Pro card pill, (c) the AI-flow purple solid dot in S1, (d) the brand-mark numerals on Surface 2 (data-as-mark).
40	
41	Never use purple on severity colors. Never gradient purple to anything.
42	
43	### Severity hues — restrained semantic palette
44	
45	| Token | Light | Dark | Use |
46	|---|---|---|---|
47	| `--red` | `#dc2626` | `#f87171` | CRITICAL / HIGH severity (text + stripes) |
48	| `--red-bg` | `#fef2f2` | `#3a1a1a` | 6-8% tint wash on row backgrounds |
49	| `--amber` | `#d97706` | `#fbbf24` | MEDIUM severity |
50	| `--amber-bg` | `#fffbeb` | `#3a2d1a` | MEDIUM tint wash |
51	| `--green` | `#059669` | `#34d399` | OK / no-issue states (sparingly — only success banners) |
52	| `--green-bg` | `#ecfdf5` | `#1a3a30` | "All clear" banner background |
53	
54	Severity hues are **always paired with a shape glyph** (▲ ● ◆ ✓) so the meaning carries to color-blind users without color.
55	
56	### Forbidden colors
57	
58	- No `#000` / `#fff`
59	- No gradients (text or background)
60	- No second saturated accent beyond purple
61	- No glassmorphism blur effects
62	- No box-shadow as a primary affordance
63	
64	---
65	
66	## 2. Typography
67	
68	Three fonts. All loaded via Google Fonts `<link>` in `<head>`. System-font fallback for each.
69	
70	```css
71	--font-h: "Plus Jakarta Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;  /* headings, semibold */
72	--font-b: "DM Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;            /* body */
73	--font-m: "DM Mono", ui-monospace, monospace;          /* numbers, IDs, fingerprints, code */
74	```
75	
76	### Type scale
77	
78	| Role | Size | Weight | Line-height | Letter-spacing | Family |
79	|---|---|---|---|---|---|
80	| H1 brand (Surface 5 hero) | `clamp(36px, 5.5vw, 68px)` | 700 | 1.08 | -0.025em | `--font-h` |
81	| H1 product (Surfaces 4, 11, 12, 13) | 32-36px | 600 | 1.15 | -0.015em | `--font-h` |
82	| H2 chapter | 22-28px | 600 | 1.25 | -0.01em | `--font-h` |
83	| H3 section title (S1 internal blocks) | 24-28px | 600

output:
1	# S4 — /dashboard (default view)
2	
3	**Route:** `/dashboard` — authenticated tier-aware default view (when no persona is selected).
4	**Status:** Locked.
5	**Anchor probes:** `/40070-[REDACTED:phone]/content/probe-j-dashboard-editorial-daily.html` + `/40070-[REDACTED:phone]/content/probe-k-dashboard-triage.html`
6	**Decision record:** `../briefs/surface-4-dashboard.md`
7	
8	## Goal
9	
10	Primary auth landing. Three blocks: cross-domain ActionQueue (new findings needing attention) + watched-domains compact grid + group nav (hidden when single group). Read at 9am, click the highest-severity item, glance at fleet.
11	
12	## Primary user action
13	
14	Land at 9am → scan ActionQueue → click highest-severity finding → drill into `/profile/<dom>` → assign or export → close laptop.
15	
16	## Visual direction
17	
18	- **Color strategy:** Restrained + 2 reserved hues. Severity red/amber/grey ONLY on ActionQueue rows + domain card left borders (3px red for critical cards). Purple = CTA only.
19	- **Theme:** light, daylight desk scene.
20	- **Anchors:** Linear (rhythm) · Stripe Radar (substantial finding rows) · The Markup (chapter typography).
21	- **Typography:** Plus Jakarta Sans semibold titles · DM Sans body · DM Mono fingerprint/stats.
22	
23	## Layout — single column
24	
25	```
26	NAV (60px — S8 chrome)
27	hairline
28	
29	MASTHEAD (~120-140px)
30	  Dashboard                            5 domains · 3 actions · 12 findings · pro
31	  Three actions need attention across your stack today.
32	                                            Last refresh 09:42 UTC · [+ Add]
33	
34	hairline + 32-48px breathing
35	
36	BLOCK A — Today's Findings  (3 substantial ActionQueue rows, Probe J)
37	  Today's Findings                          3 actions · sorted by severity
38	  Cross-domain findings that need legal action this week.
39	
40	  ▌HIGH ▲ — OpenAI undeclared in privacy notice on 3 of your domains
41	  ▌  Detected via Intercom Fin and Zendesk AI Agents pass-through.
42	  ▌  [example.com] [acme.io] [helpfulco.com]                Review →
43	
44	  ▌HIGH ▲ — Anthropic missing from DPA register on 2 domains
45	  ▌  Documentation mismatch under GDPR Art. 28.
46	  ▌  [acme.io] [helpfulco.com]                              Review →
47	
48	  ▌MED ● — HubSpot AI scoring undeclared on 1 domain
49	  ▌  Missing from subprocessor register.
50	  ▌  [example.com]                                          Review →
51	
52	  Show 4 lower-severity findings → (S10 <details> grammar)
53	
54	64px breathing + hairline
55	
56	BLOCK B — Your Domains  (Probe K compact grid)
57	  Your Domains                                       5 watched · all fresh
58	  Domains under continuous monitoring on your plan.
59	
60	  [All (5)]                                                [+ Add domain]
61	
62	  ┌─ example.com ────────┐ ┌─ acme.io ───────────┐ ┌─ helpfulco.com ─┐
63	  │● 2 HIGH · 1 MEDIUM  │ │● 2 HIGH            │ │● 1 HIGH · 1 M  │
64	  │▒▒▒░░ severity bar   │ │▒▒░░░ bar           │ │▒░▒░░ bar       │
65	  │scanned 05-26·monthly│ │scanned 05-25·month │ │scanned 05-26·m │
66	  └──────────────────────┘ └─────────────────────┘ └─────────────────┘
67	  ┌─ quiet-customer.app ─┐ ┌─ betalaunch.dev ────┐ ┌─ + Add domain ──┐
68	  │● OK                 │ │● SCANNING…         │ │ persistent add   │
69	  │░░░░▓ bar            │ │░░░░░ animated dots │ │ tile             │
70	  │scanned 05-27·weekly │ │started 09:38 UTC   │ │                  │
71	  └──────────────────────┘ └─────────────────────┘ └─────────────────┘
72	
73	FO

name: Read
output:
1	# S8 — Layout / TopNav / Footer (app chrome)
2	
3	**Implementation home:** `Layout.astro` skeleton + `TopNav.astro` + `Footer.astro` + `OrgSwitcher.astro` + `PersonaSwitcher.astro` + `UserMenu.astro` + `ThemeToggle.astro`.
4	**Status:** Locked.
5	**Decision record:** `../briefs/surface-8-layout-topnav-footer.md`
6	
7	## Goal
8	
9	The persistent shell every page lives inside. TopNav at top (60px), page content in middle, Footer at bottom (~120-160px). Chrome carries voice, doesn't shout. Zero islands by default — all dropdowns are native `<details>`.
10	
11	## Visual direction
12	
13	- **Color strategy:** Restrained. Chrome is monochrome by default. Single semantic accent on persona pill IF current persona has critical findings (red dot). `<2%` pixel area in color across chrome.
14	- **Theme:** light by default with full dark theme support via `[data-theme="dark"]` on `<html>`.
15	- **Anchors:** Linear (60px top bar) · Stripe Dashboard (org switcher mono treatment) · GitHub (footer hairlines + version mono). NOT generic SaaS nav (logo + 5 menu items + gradient CTA button).
16	- **Typography:** Plus Jakarta Sans semibold wordmark · DM Sans 14px nav items if any · DM Mono everything else (persona name, fingerprint).
17	
18	## TopNav anatomy — 60px tall
19	
20	### Authenticated variant
21	
22	```
23	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
24	│ RECONIX          [ Acme Corp ▾ ]   [ DPO ▾ ]                  [ MC ▾ ]│  ← 60px
25	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
26	hairline divider
27	```
28	
29	Left → right:
30	1. **Wordmark** `RECONIX` — DM Mono 13px semibold tracked 0.15em uppercase, slate-dark. `<a href="/dashboard">` (auth) / `<a href="/">` (anon). NO logo glyph in v1.
31	2. **Org switcher** — hidden if user has 1 org. `<details>` with `<summary>` showing org name DM Sans 14px + chevron `[▾]`. Dropdown lists orgs + `[Create org]` link.
32	3. **Persona switcher** — Pro+ tier only. Renders `[ DPO ▾ ]` mono pill. Dropdown options: `DPO / Privacy`, `MarOps`, `TPRM / Observer`. Cookie-persisted `persona=dpo|marops|tprm`.
33	4. **Flex-grow spacer.**
34	5. **User menu** — `<details>` with `<summary>` showing avatar circle (initials, slate fill) + chevron. Dropdown: `Profile`, `Billing`, `Bookmarks`, `Sign out`.
35	
36	### Anon variant
37	
38	```
39	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
40	│ RECONIX                                                  Sign in / Start →│
41	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
42	```
43	
44	Same 60px height. NO switchers. Right side carries `Sign in` link + `Start →` CTA (slate-dark button, NOT purple).
45	
46	### Free / Basic variant
47	
48	Same as Pro/Enterprise but WITHOUT the persona switcher. Org switcher renders if org count > 1.
49	
50	### Persona pill states
51	
52	```
53	[ DPO ▾ ]           normal state
54	[ DPO ● ▾ ]         critical finding present in current persona (red dot)
55	```
56	
57	## Footer anatomy — ~120-160px tall
58	
59	```
60	hairline divider (1px) · 64px breathing above
61	
62	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
63	│ RECONIX · privacy compliance scanning · v2026.5.48                  │
64	│
